title: Ligations from homocysteine isopeptide via 6-membered cyclic transition states†
author: Siva S. Panda
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Center for Heterocyclic Compounds, Department of Chemistry, University of Florida, Gainesville,  FL 32611-7200, USA 

 Chemistry Department, King Abdulaziz University, Jeddah 21589, Saudi Arabia 

  E-mail  : katritzky@chem.utl.edu    Fax : 352-392-9199  

  Manuscript received 16 July 2013, accepted 17 July 2013  

 Efficient synthesis of  S -acyl homocysteine allow chemical ligation ( S -acyl to  N -acyl transfer) via 6-membered cyclic transition state. The results represent the first example of successful isopeptide ligation starting from  S -acyl homocysteine.
